_comment: Optional manual overrides for fields without a keyless automatic source. SOURCING RULES: (1) central_banks / market blocks -> stamped [PROXY] (no keyless API for CB rates or FedWatch). (2) cot block -> stamped [OBSERVÉ — CFTC Non-Commercials | <vendredi calculé>] as PRIMARY when figures are entered: the engine computes the authoritative CFTC reference Friday automatically (last Friday 15:30 ET). The "date" field in each cot entry (e.g. "02/06") is a CROSS-CHECK HINT only -- it is stored in stamp.note for audit but does NOT drive the reference label. If the date field does not match the computed reference Friday, review your data. Market prices are fetched automatically via yfinance; add a "market" block only to override a price that failed to fetch.

FED.fact: Maintenu 3,50–3,75% le 17/06 (12-0). Dot-plot : 9/18 voient ≥1 hausse d'ici fin 2026.
FED.bias: Hawkish — biais de resserrement, hausse possible en septembre (~65% FedWatch).

BCE.bias: Hawkish — lutte contre l'inflation énergétique ; croissance révisée en baisse.

BoJ.bias: Hawkish — poursuite de la normalisation vers 2% ; risque d'intervention MoF >161.

EUR._date_note: cross-check hint only — not used as the CFTC reference date
